response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, but the resume shows minimal recent C++ work (only a brief stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015). The core stack required — C++, STL, multi-threading, MQTT, message brokers, IEC 62443, industrial automation — is largely absent. Strengths are in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web and data systems, which do not align with the on-prem industrial C++ platform role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing focus)
Experience with high-performance, low-latency systems via DLang at Sociomantic
Demonstrated mentoring and technical communication through workshops and talks
concerns: C++ experience is limited and over a decade old (2014-2015 at NI)
No exposure to IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No industrial automation, MQTT, or industrial protocol (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.) experience
